purpose: GT-only decomposition of residual C1 final-instance error; diagnostic upper bounds only, never deployable performance

lineage.seed2027: recovery-audited original C1 epoch-5 weights-only lineage and historical C3 only
lineage.seed1337: reconstructed C1 seed-1337 epoch-5 lineage and reconstructed C3 only
lineage.disallowed_seed1337: historical unrecoverable C1/C3 artifacts and their metrics

evaluator.standard_pq_rule: repository strict evaluator; historical exact-0.5 compatibility follows its pairing implementation
evaluator.aggregation: mean images within each patient, then equal mean of patients 7 and 8; two-seed macro is equal mean of seed patient-macros

component_categories.tp_boundary: P=1,G=1 and the pair is a standard-PQ TP; replace prediction with GT
component_categories.subthreshold_1to1: P=1,G=1 and not a standard-PQ TP; replace prediction with GT
component_categories.merge: P=1,G>=2; delete prediction and insert all component GT
component_categories.split_or_duplicate: P>=2,G=1; delete all predictions and insert component GT
component_categories.complex_topology: P>=2,G>=2; delete all predictions and insert all component GT

combinatorics.interaction: for each unordered pair A,B: Delta(A+B)-Delta(A)-Delta(B), with every Delta measured from C1
combinatorics.shapley: exact seven-action Shapley values across all 128 subsets for AJI and PQ
minimal_subsets: two-seed macro C0-relative AJI or PQ >= +0.020
each seed's equal-patient macro C0-relative AJI or PQ >= +0.020

classification_priority: selection_miss: all-candidate maximum IoU > 0.5 and selected-pool maximum IoU <= 0.5
candidate_pool_localization.pool_matching: native prompt-group-constrained, maximum number of IoU>0.5 matches then maximum total IoU; reported PQ is a theoretical candidate-set ceiling

quality_controls: zero action exactly reproduces C1 map and formal strict metrics
all seven actions produce the GT map exactly
all outputs are non-overlapping instance label maps
all 128 subsets are invariant to action order
Shapley contributions sum to all-oracle minus C1
C0/C1 case ID and GT maps match per seed
seed1337 source is reconstructed lineage only
audit has no model, trainer, optimiser, or weight-update operation
